hero.lead: Backend, SQL and integrations. LLMs (OpenAI · Anthropic · Gemini), workflows with Claude, Copilot, Cursor. Automation with n8n + AI. ARCA/AFIP.

skills.title: High-value skills
skills.python_d: Scripting, automation, data processing and cleaning, system-to-system integration.
skills.data_d: SQL, modeling, migrations, cleaning, exporting and validation of operational data.
skills.qa_d: Functional testing, post-deploy validation, data control and process traceability.
skills.sql_d: Table design, queries, relations, backups and review of legacy structures.

about.body: I work on backend, databases and integrations, focused on systems already in operation. I combine development, data analysis and QA. Studying Software Development at ISSD; prior background in Computer Science (FAMAF/UNC).

projects.title: Projects
projects.dfnoa_d: ARCA/AFIP integration on a legacy PHP/MySQL POS system: lookup by CUIT/CUIL, tax data autocompletion, CAE issuance, voucher states (Pending, Sending, Authorized, Rejected, Failed, Retry pending), logs and traceability. Included analysis of the existing database, homologation plan, technical manual and production readiness.
projects.arco_d: E-commerce and catalog platform with quotes and an admin panel for Arcometal (a metalworking company in Jujuy). 4-service architecture on Docker Compose — Nginx (reverse proxy + HTTPS), Laravel app, MySQL and real storage — with login/logout, password recovery, clean database and assets import, route and panel validation, backups before and after critical changes, and post-deploy technical QA.
projects.fisco_d: Own product: a tax-integration layer connecting POS, CRM, e-commerce and legacy systems with ARCA/AFIP. Modular architecture (Core · Bridge · Monitor · Pro). Your system sells. FiscoNexo invoices. Currently at functional-prototype stage.
projects.byn_d: BYNINIA Store Pro online shop with Next.js 15, React and Tailwind: catalog, individual product pages, responsive grid, local cart, floating WhatsApp button, technical SEO with JSON-LD, optimized image structure and ARS pricing. Deployed on Vercel.
projects.mangata_d: Digital presence and catalog for Mangata, an apparel brand. Catalog organization, Marketplace and Instagram strategy, local SEO, digital identity and a structure designed for conversion through social channels and WhatsApp.

xp.title: Experience
xp.sinersys_d: Building software solutions for management systems, hospitality, e-commerce, billing, payments and process automation. Stack: React, Next.js, PHP/MySQL, SQL, APIs. Analysis of data flows, database structures, forms, states, payments and real operational processes. Mobile-first interfaces connected to backend, data and business rules.
xp.dfnoa_d: Technical support and development on PHP/MySQL systems in daily operation. Inspection, validation and resolution of data inconsistencies via SQL. API/SOAP integrations, request/response analysis and error states. Contribution to ARCA/AFIP tax integration flows: customer data, voucher states, traceability and controlled testing.
xp.eversys_d: Web solutions, internal systems, e-commerce, automations and digital tools for SMBs. Stack per project: React, Next.js, PHP/MySQL, SQL, APIs, Python. Responsive and mobile-first interfaces connected to real data and processes. Research and development of own products for management, automation, lead generation and tax integrations.

stack.title: Stack & education
stack.edu_d: Software Development — ISSD (ongoing). Computer Science — FAMAF/UNC. Foundations: Programming I & II, Python, Java and Mobile Programming (Android Studio).
